Package org.eventb.core.tests.pom

Class POUtil

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.pom.POUtil
public class POUtil extends Object
Utility methods for writing a PO file.

    • addToTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder addToTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeEnv, String typeEnvImage)

    • mTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder mTypeEnvironment(String typeEnvImage, FormulaFactory factory)
      Generates the type environment specified by the given string. The string contains pairs of form ident=type separated by semicolons.

      Example of valid parameters are:

      • ""
      • "x=S"
      • "x=S; y=T"
      • "x=S; r=S↔S"

      Parameters:
      typeEnvImage - image of the type environment to generate
      factory - the formula factory to use for building the result
      Returns:
      the type environment described by the given string

    • mTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder mTypeEnvironment(String typeEnvImage)

    • mTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder mTypeEnvironment()

    • addPredicateSet

      public static IPOPredicateSet addPredicateSet(IPORoot poRoot, String setName, IPOPredicateSet parentSet, ITypeEnvironment typEnv, String... predStrings) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a predicate set to the given PO file, using the given contents.
      Parameters:
      poRoot - file in which to add the predicate set
      setName - name of the set
      parentSet - parent set (may be null)
      typEnv - type environment for the set
      predStrings - predicates of the set as strings
      Returns:
      a handle to the created set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • addSequent

      public static void addSequent(IPORoot poRoot, String poName, long poStamp, String goalString, IPOPredicateSet globalSet, ITypeEnvironment typEnv, String... localHypStrings) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a PO to the given PO file with the supplied information.
      Parameters:
      poRoot - file where to create the PO
      poName - name of the PO
      goalString - goal of the PO
      globalSet - handle to the set of global hypotheses
      typEnv - local type environment
      localHypStrings - local hypotheses as strings
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • addSequent

      public static void addSequent(IPORoot poRoot, String poName, String goalString, IPOPredicateSet globalSet, ITypeEnvironment typEnv, String... localHypStrings) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a PO to the given PO file with the supplied information.
      Parameters:
      poRoot - file where to create the PO
      poName - name of the PO
      goalString - goal of the PO
      globalSet - handle to the set of global hypotheses
      typEnv - local type environment
      localHypStrings - local hypotheses as strings
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • createPredicateSet

      private static void createPredicateSet(IPOPredicateSet poSet, IPOPredicateSet parentSet, ITypeEnvironment typEnv, String... predStrings) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException, NoSuchElementException
      Creates and populates the given predicate set with the supplied information.
      Parameters:
      poSet - predicate set to create and populate
      parentSet - parent set (may be null)
      typEnv - type environment for the set
      predStrings - predicates of the set as strings
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      NoSuchElementException
